meta.title: Bodyathlon ZMA | Premium Zinc, Magnesium & Vitamin B6
meta.description: Premium ZMA supplement. Improve your sleep, recovery and athletic performance. 120 vegan capsules.

hero.subtitle: The mineral trio that 72% of athletes need and almost none take. Zinc, Magnesium and Vitamin B6 in the exact dose to maximize your overnight recovery.

whatiszma.title: WHAT IS ZMA?
whatiszma.description: ZMA is not magic, it's science. It stands for Zinc Monomethionine Aspartate, Magnesium Aspartate and Vitamin B6. Three nutrients that work in synergy to optimize hormonal production, muscle recovery and sleep quality — especially when you train hard.
whatiszma.statLabel: of athletes have magnesium deficiency without knowing it

magnesio.name: Magnesium
magnesio.desc: Muscle relaxation and deep sleep quality

benefits.subtitle: Six reasons why thousands of athletes take it every night.

sleep.title: DEEP RESTORATIVE SLEEP
sleep.description: Fall asleep faster and wake up with real energy, not exhaustion.

recovery.title: ACCELERATED MUSCLE RECOVERY
recovery.description: Reduce post-workout muscle damage and come back stronger the next day.

energy.title: STABLE ENERGY LEVELS
energy.description: No peaks or crashes. Sustained energy throughout the day.

mental.title: IMPROVED MENTAL CLARITY
mental.description: Magnesium deficiency directly affects concentration. Fix it.

hormones.title: NATURAL HORMONAL SUPPORT
hormones.description: Zinc is a cofactor in testosterone production. Optimize it naturally.

immune.title: STRONGER IMMUNE SYSTEM
immune.description: Zinc is the #1 mineral for the immune system. Don't let it down.

ingredients.subtitle: We show every milligram because we have nothing to hide.
ingredients.dietTags: Sugar free · Gluten free · Lactose free · Vegan · Non-GMO

step2.title: ON AN EMPTY STOMACH
step2.description: Better absorption. With water, never with dairy.

howtouse.disclaimer: Do not exceed the recommended daily dose. This product is not intended to diagnose, treat, cure or prevent any disease. Consult a healthcare professional if pregnant, breastfeeding or on medication.

faq.q1: When will I start noticing results?
faq.a1: Most users report improvements in sleep quality within the first week. Benefits in recovery and energy are more noticeable after 2-3 weeks of consistent use.
faq.q2: Can I take it if I already take other supplements?
faq.a2: ZMA is perfectly compatible with proteins, creatine and vitamins. Avoid combining it with calcium supplements, as it can interfere with zinc and magnesium absorption.
faq.a3: Yes, completely. The capsules are made of vegetable cellulose and all ingredients are plant-based or synthetic (no animal products).
faq.a4: At recommended doses, ZMA is safe for healthy adults. Some people experience very vivid dreams, which is normal due to magnesium's effect on the nervous system.
faq.a5: Magnesium enhances deep sleep phases and zinc optimizes nocturnal anabolic processes. It is during sleep that the body produces and secretes the most growth hormone.
faq.q6: How many days does a 120-capsule bottle last?
faq.a6: Taking the recommended dose of 3 capsules daily, a bottle lasts exactly 40 days — more than a full month of supplementation.

footer.disclaimer: Food supplements do not replace a varied and balanced diet. Keep out of reach of children.

privacy.dataDesc: This is exactly what we store about you and what we use it for.
privacy.accountPurpose: Name, email, phone and bio — to identify and contact you.
privacy.ordersPurpose: To manage shipments, returns and warranty.
privacy.notifyPurpose: To notify you only about what interests you.
privacy.securityPurpose: Last access and IP — to protect your account from unauthorized access.
privacy.noSell: We never store your password in plain text (bcrypt hash) nor sell your data to third parties.
privacy.dangerDesc: These actions are permanent and cannot be undone.
privacy.deleteWarning: Your profile, orders, address and notifications will be permanently deleted.
privacy.dialogDesc: This action cannot be undone. All your data will be deleted: profile, orders, address and notifications.
